challenges: 🏆 **CHALLENGE:** Text a random contact in your phone 'I know what you did' and you cannot reply to or explain yourself to them for the next 24 hours.
🏆 **CHALLENGE:** Change your profile picture to the most unflattering selfie on your phone (or take one right now) and leave it there for the next 24 hours.
🏆 **CHALLENGE:** Let the group write a highly dramatic, out-of-character status update or social media post, and you must post it publicly right now.
🏆 **CHALLENGE:** Call a local fast-food place or restaurant and sing them the entire 'Happy Birthday' song as passionately and dramatically as possible before hanging up.
🏆 **CHALLENGE:** Put a large ice cube down the back of your shirt and let it melt completely without making a single sound or reacting.
🏆 **CHALLENGE:** For the next 3 rounds, you must speak exclusively in a thick Shakespearean accent and address everyone as 'My Lord' or 'My Lady'.
🏆 **CHALLENGE:** Let the group choose any YouTube video or TikTok, and you must record yourself recreating it perfectly and post it/send it to the chat.
🏆 **CHALLENGE:** Text your mom, dad, or a close family member: 'I've made a terrible mistake, don't ask questions' and ignore their calls/messages for the next 15 minutes.
🏆 **CHALLENGE:** Let the group look at your search history for 30 seconds, or let them compose a text to your most recent contact.
🏆 **CHALLENGE:** Put on as many layers of clothing as you can fit on your body in 1 minute, and wear them for the next 3 rounds.
penalties: Eat a spoonful of a terrible condiment combination chosen by the group (e.g., mustard and peanut butter).
Text your crush or an ex a single '🚨' emoji with absolutely no context and screenshot the response.
Let the group draft a message that you must send to your boss, teacher, or parent.
Give a passionate, 1-minute apology to a household object (like a chair or a toaster) for 'neglecting' it.
Keep your eyes completely closed for the next two full rounds of the game.
Talk in extremely slow motion—as if you are underwater—until your next turn.
Serenade the person to your left with a highly dramatic love song for 45 seconds.
Let the group change your social media bio or status to whatever they want for the rest of the day.
